request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_database_schema_snapshot_is_frozen>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_database_schema_snapshot_is_frozen>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):

            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope

    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )

            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database

            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()

_ ERROR at setup of test_provider_capabilities_openapi_schema_is_object_with_providers_array _

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_provider_capabilities_openapi_schema_is_object_with_providers_array>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_provider_capabilities_openapi_schema_is_object_with_providers_array>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

            or fixturedef.scope

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_character_crud_flow>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
_______ ERROR at setup of test_scene_pose_generation_and_dataset_mirror ________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_scene_pose_generation_and_dataset_mirror>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

            or fixturedef.scope

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_character_view_mapping_helpers>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
________________ ERROR at setup of test_character_naming_helper ________________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_character_naming_helper>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_character_naming_helper>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_trace_delete_output_purges_linked_records_and_files>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
___ ERROR at setup of test_trace_delete_handles_orphan_reference_output_row ____

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_trace_delete_handles_orphan_reference_output_row>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_seed_import_flow_works_with_trait_analysis_fallback>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
______ ERROR at setup of test_model_leaderboard_endpoint_returns_entries _______

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_model_leaderboard_endpoint_returns_entries>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_model_leaderboard_endpoint_returns_entries>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
________ ERROR at setup of test_admin_user_detail_role_patch_and_delete ________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_admin_user_detail_role_patch_and_delete>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_admin_user_detail_role_patch_and_delete>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
____________ ERROR at setup of test_self_service_update_and_delete _____________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_self_service_update_and_delete>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_canonical_only_costume_options_filtering>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
_______ ERROR at setup of test_scene_endpoint_forwards_identity_asset_id _______

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_scene_endpoint_forwards_identity_asset_id>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """

            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )

            return

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_create_costume_asset_with_garment_type>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_create_costume_asset_with_garment_type>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
_ ERROR at setup of test_create_costume_asset_without_garment_type_backward_compat _

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_create_costume_asset_without_garment_type_backward_compat>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_autofill_costume_asset_prompt_endpoint>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
__________ ERROR at setup of test_generate_asset_stores_pipeline_name __________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_generate_asset_stores_pipeline_name>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_upload_stores_image_as_output_asset>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_upload_stores_image_as_output_asset>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)

            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:

            or fixturedef.scope

    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_delete_output_asset_requires_ownership>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
_______ ERROR at setup of test_presence_proxy_returns_503_when_disabled ________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_presence_proxy_returns_503_when_disabled>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
__________ ERROR at setup of test_presence_proxy_maps_timeout_to_504 ___________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_presence_proxy_maps_timeout_to_504>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_presence_proxy_maps_timeout_to_504>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_presence_proxy_blocks_unknown_path>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_scene_references_hide_mock_by_default_when_not_test_runtime>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
___ ERROR at setup of test_scene_references_hide_urban_window_light_as_mock ____

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_scene_references_hide_urban_window_light_as_mock>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_video_job_cancel_endpoint>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
_______ ERROR at setup of test_video_job_delete_endpoint_cleans_orphans ________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_video_job_delete_endpoint_cleans_orphans>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_video_job_delete_endpoint_cleans_orphans>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)

            or default_loop_scope

            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_video_job_rejects_short_prompt>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Coroutine test_db_fk_cleanup_on_character_delete>>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    async def _postgres_schema_isolation(request: pytest.FixtureRequest):
        """
        PostgreSQL-only test runtime isolation.
    
        Each DB-heavy test gets a unique schema via search_path.
        Setup/teardown is best-effort safe under both success and failure.
        """
        needs_isolation = _requires_db_isolation(request.node.nodeid) or bool(
            request.node.get_closest_marker("db")
        )
        if not needs_isolation:
            yield
            return
    
        from app.config import settings
        from app.storage.sql import api as database
    
        explicit_pgtest_dsn = (
            (os.getenv("PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN") or "").strip()
            or (request.config.getoption("--pgtest-dsn", default="") or "").strip()
        )
        if not explicit_pgtest_dsn:
>           raise RuntimeError(
                "DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). "
                "Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users."
            )
E           RuntimeError: DB-isolated tests require PGTEST_POSTGRES_DSN (or --pgtest-dsn). Refusing to fall back to DATABASE_URL to avoid polluting non-test users.

tests/conftest.py:374: RuntimeError
____________ ERROR at setup of test_multi_user_character_isolation _____________

fixturedef = <FixtureDef argname='_postgres_schema_isolation' scope='function' baseid='tests'>
request = <SubRequest '_postgres_schema_isolation' for <Function test_multi_user_character_isolation>>

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^

../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:313: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper
    result = runner.run(setup(), context=context)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run
    return self._loop.run_until_complete(task)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete
    return future.result()
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
../../../miniconda3/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:309: in setup
    res = await gen_obj.__anext__()
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    @pytest.hookimpl(wrapper=True)
    def pytest_fixture_setup(fixturedef: FixtureDef, request) -> object | None:
        asyncio_mode = _get_asyncio_mode(request.config)
        if not _is_asyncio_fixture_function(fixturedef.func):
            if asyncio_mode == Mode.STRICT:
                # Ignore async fixtures without explicit asyncio mark in strict mode
                # This applies to pytest_trio fixtures, for example
                return (yield)
            if not _is_coroutine_or_asyncgen(fixturedef.func):
                return (yield)
        default_loop_scope = request.config.getini("asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope")
        loop_scope = (
            getattr(fixturedef.func, "_loop_scope", None)
            or default_loop_scope
            or fixturedef.scope
        )
        runner_fixture_id = f"_{loop_scope}_scoped_runner"
        runner = request.getfixturevalue(runner_fixture_id)
        synchronizer = _fixture_synchronizer(fixturedef, runner, request)
        _make_asyncio_fixture_function(synchronizer, loop_scope)
        with MonkeyPatch.context() as c:
            c.setattr(fixturedef, "func", synchronizer)
>           hook_result = yield
                          ^^^^^
